creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
opinion against
  http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?AANLkTinqr_1Vj8koHh1vojterWJtri-izNVBZB_pEpkr

If this PR turns out a bad idea then I'd repeat myself from boost thread:

> there should be a way to prepend search paths in /etc/rc.d/ldconfig
> despite possible footshooting. Using libmap.conf as described in
> custom-gcc article looks ugly to me.

However, even using linker hints will not save one from ports that use

  -rpath=/usr/lib:$LOCALBASE/lib
